content:
### R1: project.json projectType Detection

Read project.json for each Nx project. If projectType is library or lib, set externalize_all_packages=true. Path heuristic (/libs/) as fallback.

### R2: Build Timeout

Add 30s timeout per project build. If exceeded, log warning and skip to next project. Configurable via --timeout flag.

### R3: Parallel Builds

Build projects in parallel within each topological level. Projects at the same level have no inter-dependencies and can build concurrently.
